note: Near-misses share docs vocabulary but belong to explain (code logic), adr (create a decision record), readme (generate/update README), changelog (release notes), migration-plan (author a plan), or deep-research/context7 (external sources). mock_rate encodes the ideal outcome for --decider mock; real deciders ignore it.

queries.text: where is our auth flow documented? I know there's a doc somewhere but can't find it
how does the retry/backoff logic work here — is there a runbook or doc on it?
point me to whatever docs cover how the .marvin working directory is laid out

find docs on how kanban statuses are configured and synthesize an answer
where do we document the deployment runbook? need the operate-this steps
walk me through what src/tools/verify.ts actually does line by line
queries.note: explaining code logic → explain, not finding docs
